tasks.name: SystemHealth
prompts: Check current system health: CPU usage, available memory, and disk space. Report any values that look concerning.
Based on the system health results just reported, summarise the overall status in one sentence and flag any action needed.

tasks.name: file_backup_check
prompts: List files in the workspace directory that have been modified in the last 24 hours and report their names and sizes.

tasks.name: morning_web_scan
prompts: Search the web for recent news about local LLM frameworks, open source AI agent tools, and Ollama updates from the last 48 hours.
From the web search results just retrieved, write a brief 3-bullet summary of the most interesting developments.
